sweepstakes_dates_ordered.name: sweepstakes_dates_ordered
sweepstakes_dates_ordered.value: "sweepstakes"."start_at" is null or "sweepstakes"."end_at" is null or "sweepstakes"."start_at" <= "sweepstakes"."end_at"

sweepstakes_scores_valid.name: sweepstakes_scores_valid
sweepstakes_scores_valid.value: "sweepstakes"."entry_effort_score" between 0 and 100 and "sweepstakes"."legitimacy_score" between 0 and 100 and "sweepstakes"."source_confidence_score" between 0 and 100

sweepstakes_eligibility_ages_valid.name: sweepstakes_eligibility_ages_valid
sweepstakes_eligibility_ages_valid.value: ("sweepstakes_eligibility"."minimum_age" is null or "sweepstakes_eligibility"."minimum_age" >= 0) and ("sweepstakes_eligibility"."maximum_age" is null or "sweepstakes_eligibility"."maximum_age" >= 0) and ("sweepstakes_eligibility"."minimum_age" is null or "sweepstakes_eligibility"."maximum_age" is null or "sweepstakes_eligibility"."minimum_age" <= "sweepstakes_eligibility"."maximum_age")
